title: Doff Rose & Shrub Feed Concentrate – 1L Fast-Acting Liquid Rose Food for Healthy Growth & Bloom of Bushes & Flowers – Seaweed Enriched Plant Feed– Encourages Root Development – Makes 300L Feed
features: VERSATILE PLANT NUTRITION – Boost the health of roses, shrubs and flowering plants with Doff Rose & Shrub Feed Concentrate. Enriched with NPK 4-2-10, micro-nutrients and seaweed, this fast-acting plant fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants in outdoor gardens and indoor containers.

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Rich in nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, this plant food strengthens roots, promotes fuller blooms and colour, and improves overall plant health. Dilute 1 capful into 4.5L of water and apply the liquid fertiliser to the base of the plant, feeding every 14 days

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This rose plant feed is conveniently supplied with an integral measure for precise dilution every time. Whether nurturing flowering plants or garden bushes, Doff’s shrub plant food saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality flower food provides consistent nutrition for thriving plants year-round. Ideal for indoor and outdoor roses and shrubs, a 1-litre bottle dilutes into 300 litres of nutrient-rich rose fertiliser to support healthy growth in plants large and small

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
